title: Ubiquiti UISP-Horn, Asymmetrical sector antenna, 5GHz, 19.5dBi, 30°/25°
description: UISP-Horn is a 5 GHz sector horn antenna from Ubiquiti with an asymmetric 30°/25° (H/V) radiation angle, gain 19.5 dBi , with a special connector including a WaveGuide adapter for selected transmitter units from Ubiquiti (AF-5XHD, RP-5AC-Gen2, LTU-Rocket). This antenna offers the perfect combination of features and functions that address the main weaknesses of today's mainstream sector antennas. The UISP Horn also has a latch on each side to secure the radio unit Antenna gain 19.5 dBi Asymmetric beam angle 30°/25° (H/V) Wide frequency spectrum ( 5.150 - 6.875 GHz ) PtMP connection range 15+ km Die cast polycarbonate housing UV stabilized for increased durability and weather resistance Convenient mast mounting Two side latches to secure the radio connection Compatibility: AF-5XHD, RP-5AC-Gen2, LTU-Rocket Sector antenna Holder Bolts and Nuts Imbus Reduction to radio unit
specsSearch: Wireless features Polarization VH VSWR < 2,0 F/B ratio [dB] 40 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 20 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 25 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 30 Antenna type Sector Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors WaveGuide, (1) SMA male, (2) RSMA male
